     The Numbers Business Report

Tomorrowland (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $93,436,322Details
International Box Office $113,191,196
Worldwide Box Office $206,627,518
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,571,637
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,759,860
Total $12,331,497
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Bound by a shared destiny, former boy-genius Frank, jaded by disillusionment, and Casey, a bright, optimistic teen bursting with scientific curiosity, embark on a danger-filled mission to unearth the secrets of an enigmatic place somewhere in time and space known only as "Tomorrowland." What they must do there changes the world-and them-forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$33,028,165 (35.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$170,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,972 opening theaters/3,972 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $132,562,093

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 22nd, 2015 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 22nd, 2015 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 20th, 2015 (Wide), released as Disney Project T (Belgium)
May 20th, 2015 (Wide), released as À la poursuite de demain (France)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Panama)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Indonesia)
May 21st, 2015 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: October 13th, 2015 by Buena Vista Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for sequences of sci-fi action violence and peril, thematic elements, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2325, 3/25/2015)
Running Time: 129 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Child Prodigy, Exile, Inventor, Robot, Time Travel
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: A113
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Bound by a shared destiny, former boy-genius Frank, jaded by disillusionment, and Casey, a bright, optimistic teen bursting with scientific curiosity, embark on a danger-filled mission to unearth the secrets of an enigmatic place somewhere in time and space known only as "Tomorrowland." What they must do there changes the world-and them-forever.
